name: Ring Theory — Prime & Maximal Ideals
description: Prime ideal P: ab ∈ P ⇒ a ∈ P or b ∈ P; R/P integral domain. Maximal ideal M: no ideal strictly between M and R; R/M field. PID, UFD.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Prime ideal\nab∈P ⇒ a∈P or b∈P"]
    D2["Def: Maximal ideal\nno I with M⊂I⊂R"]
    D3["Def: PID\nall ideals principal"]
    D4["Def: UFD\nunique factorization"]
    T1["Thm: P prime ⟺ R/P\nintegral domain"]
    T2["Thm: M maximal ⟺ R/M\nfield"]
    T3["Thm: PID ⇒ UFD"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D3 --> D4
    D3 --> T3
    T2 --> T1
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3 theorem
